channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Go (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Go nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 🐹 tamnd/kage (2688 ⭐)

]]>

item.title: 🐹 IRNova/NovaRadar (174 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: IRNova

📝 Repository: IRNova/NovaRadar

📄 Descrizione: Nova Radar is a desktop IP scanner built with Go + React. It scans Cloudflare IP ranges from multiple selectable sources, performs real two-phase verification (TCP + TLS handshake), and outputs working IPs sorted by latency. Built by Nova Proxy Group.

⭐ Stelle: 174

🍴 Forks: 14

💻 Linguaggio: Go

📜 Licenza: MIT License

item.description:
👤 Owner: ory

📝 Repository: ory/talos

📄 Descrizione: Web-scale and security-hardened API key server for users, services, machine to machine, and AI agents. Token derivation brings fine-grained capability tokens to avoid common API key pitfalls. Apache2 open source for indie deployments, commercial for scalable and HA.

item.title: 🐹 kdsuomi/cc-simplerouter (121 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: kdsuomi

📝 Repository: kdsuomi/cc-simplerouter

📄 Descrizione: Install and setup in 26 seconds. Simplerouter configures Claude Code to use any compatible OpenRouter model in seconds, WITHOUT manual editing of config files, environment variables, or messing with local webservers/webUIs. It also doesn't overwrite your existing Claude Code subscription sign-in!

⭐ Stelle: 121

🍴 Forks: 1

💻 Linguaggio: Go

📜 Licenza: Other

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-29T02:22:12Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🐹 MAX-API-Next/MAX-API (116 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: MAX-API-Next

📝 Repository: MAX-API-Next/MAX-API

📄 Descrizione: MAX API Next 社区是由来自科研机构和高校的 AGI 爱好者组织发起、维护和运营的研究驱动型技术社区，聚焦 AI Models 与 Agents 治理方向，致力于建设面向 AGI 应用时代的开放基础设施。社区关注多模型与多平台接入、国产模型持续适配、AgentOps 工程实践、成本审计、权限与安全边界、私有化部署和长期运营优化，目标是把模型服务、Agent 应用、用户组织和上游平台之间的共性治理问题沉淀为稳定、可复用、可持续演进的工程能力。

⭐ Stelle: 116

🍴 Forks: 5

💻 Linguaggio: Go

📜 Licenza: GNU Affero General Public License v3.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-15T13:20:59Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-06T04:27:04Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>
